name: Project Hero
prompt_context: A premium, large-scale layout that uses full-screen imagery to convey the core mission of the project. Includes a key metrics HUD at the bottom. The tone must be perfectly aligned with the project's description provided in the system prompt.

content_schema.h1: string (The project's main value proposition, max 10 words)
content_schema.image_url: string (High-quality Unsplash image contextually relevant to the project description)

stats.label: string (Metric label derived from project goals, e.g. 'Customer Satisfaction', 'Experience', 'Global Reach')

image_hints: Select an image that perfectly visualizes the core business or organization described in the project context. Use cinematic lighting and high-contrast aesthetics.
